input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.7.5.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.7.5.3
            TITLE: the portion of the side impact zone that is vertically between the upper surface of the floor

            CONTENT:
            rule F.7.5.3: The portion of the Side Impact Zone that is vertically between the upper surface of the floor
F.7.5.3 The portion of the Side Impact Zone that is vertically between the upper surface of the floor 
and 320 mm above the lowest point of the upper surface of the floor (see figure above) must 
have: 
a. Equivalence to minimum two (2) Steel Tubes (F.3.2.1.e) per F.4.4   
b. No openings in Side View between the Front Hoop and Main Hoop

final_answer: rule F.7.5.3: The portion of the Side Impact Zone that is vertically between the upper surface of the floor F.7.5.3 The portion of the Side Impact Zone that is vertically between the upper surface of the floor and 320 mm above the lowest point of the upper surface of the floor (see figure above) must have: a. Equivalence to minimum two (2) Steel Tubes (F.3.2.1.e) per F.4.4 b. No openings in Side View between the Front Hoop and Main Hoop
